subject: fix(debug,menu): inline pill embed skip + redundant truncate
body:
Inline pill in index.html now skips load timer and pill creation in
iframe/embed contexts (window.self === window.top), matching the Vue
DebugPill skip in main.ts. Previously the inline pill would show in
embeds then vanish when __debugClearLoadTimer ran, with nothing to
replace it.

Removed redundant truncate from BurgerMenu button — the inner label
span handles truncation correctly as a flex child.

Tags: debug, burger-menu, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-compliance
Semver: patch
